The '''''Supremacy''-class attack ship''' was the primary [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]]<ref name="TOTJTSW1" /> and used by its leaders.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:KrathFleet-TSW3.jpg|thumb|left|120px|Tetan attack ships in formation above [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]].]]

The 550 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] long ''Supremacy''-class attack ship was manufactured by the [[Tetan/Legends|Tetan]] ship manufacturer [[Koros Spaceworks]] as a mobile attack platform.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

These vessels were more slender and curved than the [[Republic battleship (Great Sith War)|battleships]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Like the big Republic vessels, the Tetan attack ships had bulky superstructures with extra armor plates spread throughout the hull and a command tower in the middle of the ship.<ref name="TOTJTSW1" />

==History==
They formed the primary ships of the fleet which attacked the [[Foerost Shipyards]] early in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].
Attack ships were used in later campaigns against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] when the fighting intensified towards the end of the war.<ref name="TOTJTSW1" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]]
